item.description:
ContentCam Nightly 20260723194737 is a native macOS camera studio for creating a clean, content-ready camera feed for OBS, meetings, streams, and vertical video. All camera processing stays on your Mac.
## Commits since previous Nightly `nightly-20260723192517`
- [`fd996e1`](https://github.com/jayb029/contentcam/commit/fd996e15b37c5cdf39c191de1d6a9194c53929e7) Make releases more compatable - [`ac8c6f8`](https://github.com/jayb029/contentcam/commit/ac8c6f82f17c6b17a436171dbedf3d724be356e9) Bump build number to 20260723194737 [skip ci]
[View the full changelog](https://github.com/jayb029/contentcam/releases/tag/nightly-20260723194737)
